message:
🐛 Fix nightly E2E widget: treat queued/waiting runs as active (flashing blue) (#1066)

Runs with status 'queued', 'waiting', or 'pending' were falling through
to the grey fallback because only 'in_progress' was treated as active.
Changed check to `status !== 'completed'` so all non-completed runs
(queued, waiting, in_progress, pending) show as flashing blue.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
